description: Browser automation using Playwright with multi-browser and multi-window support

open_browser.name: Open Browser
open_browser.description: Open a web browser and optionally navigate to a URL

new_page.name: New Page
new_page.description: Create a new page/tab in the current browser

switch_browser.name: Switch Browser
switch_browser.description: Switch to a different browser context

list_browsers.name: List Browsers
list_browsers.description: Get list of all browser instance IDs

list_pages.name: List Pages
list_pages.description: Get list of all page instance IDs

get_current_browser.name: Get Current Browser
get_current_browser.description: Get the ID of the currently active browser

get_current_page.name: Get Current Page
get_current_page.description: Get the ID of the currently active page

navigate.name: Navigate
navigate.description: Navigate to a URL or perform back/forward/refresh actions

click_element.name: Click Element
click_element.description: Click an element on the page (single, double, or right click)

input_text.name: Input Text
input_text.description: Input or type text into an input field

press_keys.name: Press Keys
press_keys.description: Press keyboard keys or key combinations

select_option.name: Select Option
select_option.description: Select option(s) from a dropdown or select element

get_element_text.name: Get Element Text
get_element_text.description: Get the text content of an element

get_element_attribute.name: Get Element Attribute
get_element_attribute.description: Get an attribute value from an element

get_page_title.name: Get Page Title
get_page_title.description: Get the title of the current page

wait_for_page_load.name: Wait For Page Load
wait_for_page_load.description: Wait for the page to finish loading

wait_for_element.name: Wait For Element
wait_for_element.description: Wait for an element to reach a specific state

wait_for_selector.name: Wait For Selector
wait_for_selector.description: Wait for an element matching a selector to appear

take_screenshot.name: Take Screenshot
take_screenshot.description: Take a screenshot of the current page

set_screenshot_on_failure.name: Set Screenshot On Failure
set_screenshot_on_failure.description: Configure automatic screenshot capture on activity failures

validate_selector.name: Validate Selector
validate_selector.description: Validate that a selector matches an element on the page

wait_until_element_contains_text.name: Wait Until Element Contains Text
wait_until_element_contains_text.description: Wait until an element contains specified text

upload_file.name: Upload File
upload_file.description: Upload a file using a file input element

download_file.name: Download File
download_file.description: Click a download link and save the file

get_element_properties.name: Get Element Properties
get_element_properties.description: Get detailed properties of an element

inspect_page.name: Inspect Page
inspect_page.description: Get all interactive elements on the page with their selectors

highlight_element.name: Highlight Element
highlight_element.description: Temporarily highlight an element on the page

test_selector.name: Test Selector
test_selector.description: Test a CSS or XPath selector and return match information

get_xpath_from_point.name: Get XPath From Point
get_xpath_from_point.description: Get the selector for an element at given screen coordinates

close_page.name: Close Page
close_page.description: Close the current or specified page/tab

close_browser.name: Close Browser
close_browser.description: Close the current or all browsers
